stemHtml: What response does the pilot anticipate from Air Traffic Control (ATC) after transmitting a distress message following an engine failure in a single-engine aircraft?

options.a: Instruct the pilot to stop transmitting to allow other aircraft to continue with their communications.
options.b: Immediately clear the airspace for the distressed aircraft and provide priority assistance.
options.c: Disregard the distress message and continue with regular communications.
options.d: Request the distressed aircraft to switch frequencies for further instructions.
